content:
@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix(skew_boundary)
C: minimal_diff ∧ preserve_next(err) ∧ skew_budget=30s
P: replace("<") with cmp(expMs+skew_ms, "<", nowMs) ∧ define(SKEW_MS=30000) ∧ single_site(auth_mw)
V: test(expMs==nowMs pass) ∧ test(expMs+30000==nowMs pass) ∧ test(expMs+30001<nowMs "401") ∧ test(no_refresh_loop)
A: patch(auth_mw expiry_cmp) ∧ regression(skew_boundary)

@flint v0 hybrid
G: choose_arch
C: team("6") ∧ ddl("4 months") ∧ ops_pt_devops ∧ traffic_modest
P: default(modular_monolith) ∧ db("PostgreSQL") ∧ clean_module_seams ∧ defer_split(post_release)
V: ship_within("4 months") ∧ low_ops_load ∧ split_ready
A: modular_monolith "PostgreSQL" small_team("6") short_ddl("4 months") low_ops split_post_release

@flint v0 hybrid
G: reject_patch
C: public_boundary ∧ session_authoritative
P: drop header("x-user-id") ∧ bind userId=session.userId ∧ keep 401_on_missing_session
V: test spoof("x-user-id") ∧ test missing_session→401 ∧ test cross_user_denied
A: high_severity impersonation ∧ horizontal_escalation

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor("loadUser")
C: preserve_order ∧ minimal_change ∧ single_error_mapping
P: validate("missing_id") → await("db.findUser") → branch("not_found") → side_effects("audit.log","cache.set") → respond
V: test_success ∧ test_missing_id ∧ test_db_err_via("next(err)") ∧ test_no_double_callback
A: async_await wrap("db.findUser") keep("next(err)")

@flint v0 hybrid
G: stop_heap_growth
C: minimal_diff ∧ preserve_tick_order
P: audit setInterval(cb) ∧ null_batch_after_flush ∧ avoid_outer_scope_capture ∧ unref_timer_refs
V: heap_stable_over_N_ticks ∧ empty_queue_no_growth ∧ gc_after_flush
A: root_cause="cb closes over batch rows never reassigned" min_fix="reassign batch=null post-flush + hoist pure helpers out of interval" reg_test="run 1000 empty ticks assert heapUsed delta < threshold"

@flint v0 hybrid
G: design_audit_log_schema
C: "PostgreSQL" ∧ "7 years" ∧ monthly_partition ∧ compliance_export ∧ lean_ops
P: table(audit_log) → cols(id ts actor_id action target_type target_id "JSONB" request_id) → partition_by_range(ts month) → idx(ts actor_id target) → export_view(month) → retention_drop_partition("7 years")
V: test(insert_current_month) ∧ test(query_by_actor_range) ∧ test(export_month_dump) ∧ test(drop_partition_past_7y) ∧ test(jsonb_gin_lookup)
A: declarative_partitioned_parent ∧ child_per_month ∧ "JSONB"_payload_gin ∧ drop_old_partition_cheap ∧ export_per_month_view

@flint v0 hybrid
G: review(rl_key)
C: public_edge ∧ no_trust("X-Forwarded-For")
P: drop_header_trust → key_from(req.ip) → set_ttl("Redis") → atomic_incr_expire
V: spoof_xff_denied ∧ missing_xff_uses_ip ∧ ttl_set ∧ multi_ip_xff_parsed
A: bind_key(req.ip) ∧ pipeline(incr expire) ∧ verify_gateway_contract

@flint v0 hybrid
G: extract_currency_helper
C: call_sites_unchanged ∧ minimal_diff ∧ "package.json" ∧ "semver"
P: create("@atlas/currency") → move_helper → add_deps("package.json") → replace_imports(billing audit gateway) → remove_duplicates
V: unit_parity ∧ snapshot_format ∧ locale_cases ∧ rounding_edges ∧ import_smoke
A: pkg("@atlas/currency@1.0.0") ∧ "semver"_minor_on_additions ∧ patch_on_fixes ∧ major_on_format_break

@flint v0 hybrid
G: idempotent_webhook
C: postgres ∧ provider_retries ∧ observable
P: extract("Idempotency-Key") → upsert(idempotency_keys unique) → on_conflict return_stored_response → else process_and_store
V: test(duplicate_key_returns_stored) ∧ test(concurrent_insert_one_winner) ∧ test(missing_key_rejected "409") ∧ metric(replay_count)
A: dedup=unique_key_row error=reject_missing_key_"409"_else_return_cached_response why=single_write_site_collapses_retries_to_one_effect

@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix("N+1")
C: preserve_response_shape ∧ min_fix
P: batch("db.findUser") ∧ prefetch(customerIds) ∧ map_by_id
V: reg_test(latency_budget) ∧ assert(query_count=2)
A: min_fix ∧ reg_test
